title: dobrowskya scabra
intro: Dobrowskya scabra, also known as the Himalayan rock dodder, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The medicinal properties of Dobrowskya scabra include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving digestion, and treating fever. In herbal preparations, Dobrowskya scabra is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and ointments, and is also used as a component in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicines.
